requirement: Buyer can initiate supplier onboarding process by providing basic information.
Internal approval workflow is triggered after buyer initiates supplier onboarding process.
Supplier receives invitation to register with AECI and complete due diligence steps after internal approval.
Supplier can register with AECI and complete due diligence steps via Coupa Supplier Portal (CSP).
Supplier information is accurate and current after completion of due diligence steps.
Supplier creation and onboarding process is managed by Coupa SIM.
Supplier can be deactivated or reactivated in Coupa SIM.
Supplier status management includes purchase block, payment block, and supplier deactivation/reactivation.
Buyer can create a purchase order for approved suppliers.
Supplier onboarding process allows internal registration for urgent or specific supplier types.
Supplier information can be updated by internal users.
Supplier status can be updated to block purchase or payment, deactivate, or reactivate.
One-time vendor process allows faster vendor creation with simplified approval flow and reduced data requirements.
Coupa supports auto-translation of standard information on the user interface for multiple languages.
System must support local language requirements.
